name: pilot-azure
description: Azure / Bicep / ACA codebase governance: resource-naming conventions, security baseline, Well-Architected Framework review, Bicep patterns, centralized observability (Log Analytics/App Insights/alerting), CI/CD deployment security (OIDC, approval gates), multi-region disaster recovery, cost/FinOps guardrails, AKS cluster governance (Pod Security Standards, Workload Identity), API Management gateway policy review, enterprise-scale landing-zone/subscription topology, SLO/error-budget policy, and container image security (scanning, non-root, signing)
